title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Find My Device Play button plays tone on both earbuds with flashing lights and animated stop button; tapping Stop returns to previous state
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure both earbuds are connected and appear under [Device Name].
Navigate to [Device Name] → Find My Device.
Tap the Play button in the Find My Device section.
Observe the behavior while the tone is playing.
expected: A tone plays on both earbuds with flashing lights. The app displays a "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button and illustration. Tapping Stop returns to the previous state (Find My Device screen or Home screen).
